runs.context_blueprint: {"language": "JavaScript", "build_system": "npm", "package_manager": "npm", "build_commands": ["npm install", "grunt copy:demo uglify:html5shiv"], "install_commands": [], "runtime_requirements": {"language_version": "lts-bookworm", "system_packages": []}, "repo_type": "library", "base_image": "node:lts-bookworm", "base_image_rationale": "Official Node.js image for Debian bookworm, suitable for building Grunt-based frontend assets.", "pitfalls": ["Running a watch task in a container will block the build; invoke grunt with explicit targets to avoid launching watchers.", "No explicit engines field in package.json; Node version is determined by base image; ensure compatibility with dependencies."], "notes": "Gruntfile.js defines tasks to copy source files to dist and uglify JavaScript into dist; the build outputs are placed under dist/ (e.g., dist/*.min.js)."}
runs.final_dockerfile:
# Use official Node.js LTS on Debian Bookworm
FROM node:lts-bookworm

# Create app directory
WORKDIR /usr/src/app

# Install system dependencies needed for building native modules
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    build-essential ca-certificates \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install app dependencies (including grunt)
COPY package.json package.json
RUN npm install

# Copy the rest of the source code
COPY . .

# Build the project from source using explicit grunt tasks to avoid watch mode
RUN ./node_modules/.bin/grunt copy:demo uglify:html5shiv

# Optionally clean npm cache
RUN npm cache clean --force || true

# Install a lightweight static server to serve the built artifacts
RUN npm install -g http-server

EXPOSE 8080

# Serve the built dist directory
CMD ["http-server", "dist", "-p", "8080"]

artifacts.content:
# Use official Node.js LTS on Debian Bookworm
FROM node:lts-bookworm

# Create app directory
WORKDIR /usr/src/app

# Install system dependencies needed for building native modules
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    build-essential ca-certificates \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install app dependencies (including grunt)
COPY package.json package.json
RUN npm install

# Copy the rest of the source code
COPY . .

# Build the project from source using explicit grunt tasks to avoid watch mode
RUN ./node_modules/.bin/grunt copy:demo uglify:html5shiv

# Optionally clean npm cache
RUN npm cache clean --force || true

# Install a lightweight static server to serve the built artifacts
RUN npm install -g http-server

EXPOSE 8080

# Serve the built dist directory
CMD ["http-server", "dist", "-p", "8080"]
